heading: Step 2: Update your knowledge base configuration.
body:
Either [create a new knowledge base](bedrock-knowledge-base)
with Atlas as the vector store, or [modify](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/bedrock/latest/userguide/kb-update.html)
an existing knowledge base.

- In the vector store configuration, set the
  **Text search index name** field to `search_index`,
  or the name of your MongoDB Search index if you used a different name.

  ![Screenshot of the vector store search index configuration section.](/ai-integrations/images/amazon-bedrock-hybrid-search-config.png)

- Save the configuration.
